SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance-strict] active: final responses must include explicit validation outcomes and skipped-check reasons.'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance-strict] enforce: keep layering boundaries, no secrets/customer data, no emoji in code/logging/comments, and Python-first cross-platform automation.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance-strict] gate: verify get_errors clean for changed files and report any unvalidated checks.'"
